# Momo Matcha

> Prémium, bio ceremonial matcha webshop Magyarországon (momomatcha.hu).
> Premium, organic ceremonial-grade matcha from Uji, Japan — classic and
> flavored matchas (Original, Strawberry, Vanilla, Chocolate), sold
> direct-to-consumer in Hungary. All shop content is in Hungarian.

Momo Matcha sources ceremonial-grade matcha from Uji, Japan, and sells it in
30g / 50g / 100g sizes plus a matcha starter set (bowl, bamboo whisk, holder,
sifter). Delivery across Hungary via GLS (home delivery and parcel points) or
FoxPost parcel lockers, free shipping over 15 000 HUF, cash-on-delivery
available, 14-day return policy. Contact: info@momomatcha.hu.

## Termékek (Products)

- [Original prémium matcha](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/products/original-premium-momo-matcha): classic ceremonial grade, best drunk pure with water
- [Epres prémium matcha](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/products/epres-premium-momo-matcha): strawberry-flavored, made for lattes
- [Vaníliás prémium matcha](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/products/vanilias-premium-momo-matcha): vanilla-flavored, soft and silky, made for lattes
- [Csokoládés prémium matcha](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/products/csokoladas-premium-momo-matcha): chocolate-flavored, made for lattes
- [Összes termék](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/store): full catalog

## Tudástár (Guides)

- [Hogyan készíts tökéletes matchát otthon](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/tudastar/matcha-keszites): step-by-step brewing guide — water temperature (75–80 °C), whisking, matcha latte, common mistakes
- [Matcha vs. kávé](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/tudastar/matcha-vs-kave): caffeine content (35–70 mg per serving), L-theanine and calm focus, when to choose which
- [Tudástár](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/tudastar): all guides

## Vásárlási információk (Shop policies)

- [Szállítás](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/pages/shipping): GLS / FoxPost, 1–3 business days, free over 15 000 HUF
- [Gyakori kérdések](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/gyik): FAQ — preparation, caffeine, storage, ordering, shipping
- [Visszaküldés](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/pages/refunds): 14-day withdrawal right
- [Rólunk](https://momomatcha.hu/hu/pages/about): brand story — Uji, Japan; slow-living rituals
